mapper.select: select id from enum_categories where category = #{category} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1

select id, category, category_name AS categoryName, description, is_system AS isSystem, is_enabled AS isEnabled, is_deleted AS isDeleted from enum_categories where category = #{category} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into enum_categories(category, category_name, description, is_system, is_enabled, is_deleted) values(#{category}, #{categoryName}, #{description}, #{isSystem}, #{isEnabled}, 0)
